paper_title: A simple mixing model for PDW-SCW δ 13 C gradient analysis

methods.description: This method simulates the PDW δ 13 C values under the null hypothesis that PDW ventilation remained unchanged throughout the Late Pleistocene. It uses a simple mixing model assuming PDW is derived from a constant mixing ratio of NCW and SCW plus a constant remineralization offset.

steps.description: Simulate PDW δ 13 C values using a simple mixing model with a constant mixing ratio of NCW and SCW plus a constant remineralization offset.
steps.searchable_summary: simulate PDW δ 13 C values using a mixing model

steps.description: Estimate the mixing ratio f and remineralization offset c by minimizing the root mean square error between the model and the PDW stack for 800-0 ka.
steps.searchable_summary: estimate mixing ratio and offset by minimizing RMSE

steps.description: Validate the model by comparing the fit between model and data for the entire Late Pleistocene.
steps.searchable_summary: validate model fit with correlation coefficient and RMSE
